_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Removing the top toolbar containing the three shuffle buttons.

Shuffle buttons will move directly beside their dropdowns. Each select-plus-shuffle pair will sit in a flex row. The shuffle-all button will go inside the path result area. Random note will keep only its heading; its select and shuffle will share a row.

A shared `.notes-random-controls` CSS class will wrap each dropdown and its shuffle button in a flex row. The select element will drop its bottom margin, and the row will carry it instead. Reusing the select partial was considered but rejected in favor of inline wrappers.

The flex row will use `gap: 0.75rem` and `margin-bottom: 0.75rem`. The select element will get `flex: 1`, `min-width: 0`, and `mb-0` so it fills the row. The path result div will hold the shuffle-all button alongside the chain.

The shuffle-all button will sit to the right of the path chain, possibly pushed with `ml-auto shrink-0`. For random note, the shuffle button will move from the header beside the title to sit beside the dropdown. Blog random note lacks a shortest path section, so its toolbar may stay title-only.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Placing the shuffle-all button inside the path container would hide it when no path exists. The user wants it positioned right of the shortest path instead.

Restructuring the path area into an always-visible toolbar row solves the visibility problem. The shuffle-all button stays permanently visible while sitting directly beside the shortest path section.

The shuffle button will sit on the right side of the path row, remaining visible even when no path exists. The user likely wants it placed immediately beside the shortest path text rather than inside a separate bordered container.

A flex row will hold the path info and the shuffle button together. The CSS will get a new `.notes-random-controls` class. For random-duo, the existing shuffle toolbar will be removed and each dropdown paired with its side shuffle button. The path section will move into an always-visible toolbar. For random-unrelated-notes, the header shuffle button will be removed and the dropdown paired with a shuffle button in a controls div.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

Repositioning shuffle controls: moving them next to their related UI elements and adding minimal CSS for select+button rows.

Repositioned the shuffle controls:

**Random Duo** (`/notes/random-duo/`)
- **Shuffle both** — to the right of the shortest-path row (always visible; path box still toggles)
- **Shuffle left** — to the right of the left note dropdown
- **Shuffle right** — to the right of the right note dropdown
- Removed the old top toolbar with all three buttons

**Random Note** (blog posts + note pages)
- **Shuffle** — to the right of the note dropdown (removed from the section heading row)

Added `.notes-random-controls` so each dropdown + shuffle button sits on one row. JS is unchanged — same `data-*` attributes.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
`.btn-sm` has a fixed `min-height` of 44px from `custom.css` at all breakpoints. This prevents consistent heights across rows.

The select element is shorter because its padding and line-height are smaller than the button's. The `w-full` class may also cause layout issues. To align them properly, both elements should share the same `min-height` or a shared height variable. Using `align-items: stretch` instead of `center` would force them to fill the row evenly.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The custom.css file applies a minimum height of 2.75rem to all .btn-sm elements, including desktop. This likely prevents consistent heights across buttons in the same row.

The select element is only about 2rem tall while the button is forced to 2.75rem. I will set both elements to the same min-height and padding inside `.notes-random-controls` so they align in the same row.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Removing `mb-3 w-full` from the partial. It is only used inside `.notes-random-controls`, so `notes-random-select` alone should suffice.

Updating CSS to enforce consistent heights across the dropdown and shuffle rows. Considering `flex-wrap: nowrap` to keep elements on one line, though this may cause overflow on narrow screens. Mobile wrapping is acceptable if heights stay uniform.

Using `nowrap` with `min-width: 0` on the select so it shrinks without wrapping. Adding explicit `height` to both the select and button for pixel-perfect alignment. Adjusting line-height to vertically center text within the taller element.

The select needs an explicit `min-height` to match the button. The path toolbar row was considered but set aside because its bordered box has extra padding, making consistent heights impossible there. The fix stays scoped to `.notes-random-controls`.

The path row shuffle button is already vertically centered by its flex container, so it does not need changes. The select text may not center itself, so an explicit height on the select is being added to guarantee consistent heights.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

Matching select and button heights to the touch-target size and keeping them on one row.

_**Agent (default)**_

Aligned the dropdown and shuffle controls on one row with matching heights:

- **Same row** — `flex-wrap: nowrap` keeps select + button side by side
- **Same height** — both use `height` and `min-height: var(--touch-target-min)` (2.75rem), matching `btn-sm`
- **Matching padding** — select uses `padding-block: var(--btn-py)` so vertical spacing matches the button
- **Stretch alignment** — `align-items: stretch` so both fill the row height evenly

Also dropped `mb-3 w-full` from the select partial; layout is handled by `.notes-random-controls` now.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Adding compact path toolbar CSS and updating random-duo.html to match the shuffle button height.

The notes page was considered but skipped since it lacks a shuffle button. The plan is to add a `.notes-path-toolbar` class, remove Tailwind padding and gap utilities from the path result div, and use `items-stretch` for vertical alignment.

The compact CSS sets a 0.5rem gap and a 2.75rem minimum height. The path chain uses horizontal overflow scrolling to keep the height fixed when the path is long. The empty state also respects the minimum height. Hidden elements do not consume space.
</details></think>

Compacting the shortest-path row to match the shuffle button height with tighter CSS and template updates.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The box has no visible border because the `border` class was removed during compaction. Only `border-divider` remains, which sets color but not width.

Long paths risk breaking layout because flex:1 lets content expand the parent instead of scrolling. Overflow: hidden and min-width: 0 are needed on the result container. The heading text also needs fixing. The plan is to add a visible border to the result box and constrain overflow so long chains scroll internally.

The toolbar needs `flex-wrap: nowrap` to stay on one row. The heading should be `shrink-0`. The path chain needs `overflow-x: auto` and `min-width: 0` to scroll internally. The hidden empty state should not consume space.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

_**Agent (default)**_

Fixed three issues in that toolbar:

1. **Missing border** — the compact refactor dropped the `border` class; only `border-divider` (color) remained. The path box now has `border: 1px solid var(--color-divider)`.

2. **Long paths breaking the row** — four links were stretching the box instead of scrolling. The path result uses `overflow: hidden`, the chain scrolls horizontally, and links stay `flex-shrink: 0` so the row stays one line at button height.

3. **Label copy** — "A shortest path:" → **"Shortest path:"**

The path box and Shuffle button should now stay on one row at the same height, with long paths scrolling inside the box.

`renderPathBetween` returns null early if `emptyEl` is missing. The empty notes path element can be removed safely.

Removed the empty-path message from Random Duo. When there's no wikilink path, the path box simply hides and only Shuffle shows.
